intent: 1BR / 1 bath wide LDK smoke test, no carport. 11x8 lot gives a 7x4 envelope = 28 m2 floor -- the LDK sibling of 1s_1br_wd_side_split_bath_gr, which stays compact-only (min is always the gr topology's job; this ldk sibling is infeasible at the gr topology's 10x8 canonical). Full-depth bedroom column; living + dining side-by-side in the front band, bath + kitchen side-by-side in the rear band -- living stacks with bath, dining stacks with kitchen. Needed ldk_horizontal: true and mechanical_vent: true on living (window-area warning at some sizes).
must_haves: living and dining side-by-side, hosting the entry
